title: Triodon
intro:
There is no information available on a plant called "Triodon". However, it's possible that you may be referring to a different plant name or a misprint.

If you are referring to the plant called "Tripterygium wilfordii" (also known as "thunder of god vine"), it is a plant used in traditional Chinese medicine. The health benefits of Tripterygium wilfordii include its anti-inflammatory and immunomodulatory properties, which have been shown to be effective in treating various conditions such as rheumatoid arthritis and certain types of cancer. The bioactive constituents of Tripterygium wilfordii include triptolide, triptophenolide, and celastrol, among others. The most common herbal preparations made with Tripterygium wilfordii include extracts, capsules, and teas, which are used to treat various health conditions.

Please note that I assumed the plant name as "Tripterygium wilfordii" based on the closest information available.
parts: I couldn't find any information about a plant called "Triodon".
